evals.prompt: Trace the lineage of a document.
evals.expected_output: An object representing the supersedes/precedes chain for the document.
assertions: trace_document_lineage is called with a real document_id (resolved via search, not invented)
Response includes the document and any predecessors/successors

evals.prompt: Find inbound citations for a document via graph traversal.
evals.expected_output: Documents reachable from the start document through the specified edge types within max_hops.
assertions: graph_search is called with start_document_id set
edge_types restricts traversal to citation-style edges (cites, references) for citation traversal
